posts.text:
Join the conversation on Cuomo Mornings.
Call @SIRIUSXM now at 866-967-6887

Which pod bros do that in this thunderdome hellscape?


"Doc" Hypnosis 🧠 | BowTied Brain-Hacking (@BowTiedTrance)

I gave you the formula for knowing which podcaster to listen to.

It's whichever one makes you feel energized and not demoralized when you're done listening to them.

Usually that means they're giving you a clear strategy for action. Go be useful.



— https://nitter.net/BowTiedTrance/status/2033732685454000569#m

Fuck you twice. We agree...muslims are not the issue...extreme islamism is...


Jusaskin (@Jusaskintard)

Fuck off dude. Having served overseas I can tell you Muslims are good people. If we allow their most radical to change opinion of a whole group of people then we are just as bad as the cancel culture freaks that exiled you to where ever your show broadcast now.



— https://nitter.net/Jusaskintard/status/2033689916069290120#m

You think Iran is a scary situation? Just wait...what happens in Lebanon may be the bloodiest and trickiest challenge yet...here is why:

Video

Amazing how 9/11 and the design of extreme islamism is just ignored for clicks


Dave Smith (@ComicDaveSmith)

Islam is such a violent religion. Every time we murder a bunch of their children, they try to kill some of us. Disgusting.



— https://nitter.net/ComicDaveSmith/status/2033314035765002451#m

And balances equities and facts...not all sides are equal


Victor Giardina (@siciliantaurus)

Real journalism tells all sides of the story.



— https://nitter.net/siciliantaurus/status/2033530865662173230#m

My bias for my family? To help a brother? Never lying to do so and with my boss' knowledge and approval?  You dont know shit. No wonder you are commenting on here. Lemming.


Erica Sullivan (@ericasullivan00)

Aren’t you in Israel? Listen you’ve also proven your biases can’t be overridden, which is why you aren’t still at CNN.



— https://nitter.net/ericasullivan00/status/2033531198161489960#m

You really think I am defending the surveillance state? As a journalist who has had my comms compromised?  I am saying tucker has a history of making things up and we need proof of him being targeted and that eve if true he is not in the wrong. More to come


Jon Stewart (@JonStewartIL)

That Apple Corp, my village PD, two computer experts and the FBI "we cannot explain how your emails disappeared off your iPhone, on four different platform's."  This happened three times.



— https://nitter.net

Says the bot. This is all fake.


macsmith (@sssammythebull)

You and your “this is all about clicks” line is so played out. Is that what you are trying to do? Projection?



— https://nitter.net/sssammythebull/status/2033513331504681252#m

Step back: what proof is there govt is reading texts?  Start there.


Will Chamberlain (@willchamberlain)

Tucker - if I may, some follow-up questions. 

1) Which Iranians were you talking to?
2) When did you have those conversations?
3) What did they tell you?
4) What did you tell them?



— https://nitter.net/willchamberlain/status/2033220619672637761#m

???


Rep. Melanie Stansbury (@Rep_Stansbury)

Remember when Trump sued ABC, Meta, X, and Paramount, and they all agreed to settle for millions of dollars?  

Well, that money was supposed to go to Trump’s future presidential library fund—except that fund has been dissolved with no public accounting of where the money went.  

If these payments were labeled “charitable contributions,” the corporations could even write them off on their taxes. That’s why @SenWarren, @SenBlumenthal, and I are dema

No facts. No problem.


Ana Kasparian (@AnaKasparian)

This is extremely disturbing.



— https://nitter.net/AnaKasparian/status/2033025038585397488#m

No


MarnieR (@getmoving2013)

Have you read the text messages Yourself? Has tucker released them?



— https://nitter.net/getmoving2013/status/2033372726757343662#m

Forget guilty...we have no idea if it happened ... this is all abt clicks


westernviews (@William16936022)

Tucker is worth over 50 million. He knows better than trying to hide behind journalism. He is an elite masquerading as a friend to the common man.  If he is guilty so  be it.



— https://nitter.net/William16936022/status/2033384745971961901#m

What was illegal? The law protecting the church is not a simple xpass statute.


Pwns On X (@PwnyRides)

Genuine question: Where is the line between doing illegal things “for journalism” and just outright doing something illegal?

Are journalists immune to being held criminally accountable like the rest of us peasants bc they can say they’re a journalist?

What’s your opinion?



— https://nitter.net/PwnyRides/status/2033375487662100559#m

24 MILLION VIEWS!!!  Any proof?  Seems not to matter.


Tucker Carlson (@TuckerCarlson)

When you discover the CIA has been reading your texts in order to frame you for a crime.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/TuckerCarlson/status/2032954928977818069#m
Penn is in ukraine...fade culkin for this:  instagram.com/p/DV7OKqfDXsd/…
